mood.label: CAUTIOUSLY-RISK-ON
mood.summary: Futures are mixed after a tech-led rally yesterday, with focus on the Nasdaq debut of chipmaker SK Hynix and ongoing geopolitical tensions in the Middle East.

indicesNarrative: US futures are mixed, with the Dow showing slight gains while the tech-heavy Nasdaq 100 is pulling back after a strong chip-driven rally yesterday. Investors are weighing ongoing US-Iran tensions against the highly anticipated Nasdaq debut of memory chip giant SK Hynix. Treasury yields remain elevated, holding near 4.56%.
technicalsNarrative: Technical data was not available at the time of generation.

sectorsThemes.name: Technology
sectorsThemes.note: Led yesterday's rally on AI chip strength.

sectorsThemes.name: Energy
sectorsThemes.note: Showed strength in the prior session.

sectorsNarrative: Technology, particularly semiconductors, showed strong leadership in the previous session, while financials and consumer discretionary lagged. The market is watching to see if the AI-driven momentum can be sustained.
industryNarrative: Semiconductors were the clear standout group, surging on optimism around AI demand ahead of the SK Hynix IPO. The Philadelphia Semiconductor Index (SOX) jumped 3.1% yesterday.

movers.why: Reported strong quarterly earnings, beating estimates.

traderLens.name: Minervini
traderLens.view: Market is in a rally attempt, but mixed signals warrant caution. Focus on A-grade setups only.

traderLens.name: Ted Zhang
traderLens.view: Clear rotation into Technology and Semiconductors yesterday. Watch for follow-through or a rotation out today.

traderLens.name: Clement Ang
traderLens.view: Market context is choppy. Futures are mixed, geopolitical risks remain. Not an ideal environment for aggressive long positions.

traderLens.name: SRxTrades
traderLens.view: Wait for clean pivots and volume confirmation. Chasing pre-market moves in this tape is low-probability.

traderLens.name: Jeff
traderLens.view: Stick to your rules. Honor your stops. The mixed pre-market is a reminder that the market can reverse quickly.

traderLens.name: Qullamaggie
traderLens.view: Look for episodic pivots with strong volume. DAL had an earnings beat but is trading down pre-market, indicating a weak reaction.

traderLens.name: Composite
traderLens.view: Be patient today. The tape is mixed after a strong tech run. Wait for the market to establish a clear direction after the open. Focus on managing existing positions rather than initiating new aggressive ones.

yesterdayReactions.result: beat EPS ($1.56 vs $1.51 est), missed Rev ($17.67B vs $17.76B est), raised guidance

alert: Highly anticipated Nasdaq debut of South Korean chipmaker SK Hynix today.

news.headline: US stock futures mixed as traders weigh tech rally against geopolitical risks and SK Hynix IPO.
Delta Air Lines reports mixed Q2 results, beating on EPS but missing revenue estimates; raises full-year guidance.
Asian markets were mostly higher, while European markets were mixed as tech stocks came under pressure.
Oil prices fell as investors weighed ongoing US-Iran tensions against reports that diplomatic talks could resume.
